titleStmt.title: SII 9.553: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 553. (A.R. No. 51 of 1904.) ON THE PEDASTAL OF THE NANDI NEAR THE SHRINE OF VIRABHADRA AT KUDATANI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Adhika-Bhādrapada, ba. 30, Śu[kravāra], corresponding to A.D. 1532 August 30, Friday. It refers itself to the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya and records that Koṇḍapa, brother-in-law of Bhaṇḍārada Timmapa-Ayya, made a gift of land, together with some toll revenue, for offerings to the god Vīrabhadra at Kuḍutaṇi. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of Timmapa-Ayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śālivāhanaśakavaru
ṣa 1454 neya naṁdanasaṁvacharada Adhi
kabhādrapada ba 30 śu lu śrīma(ṁ)n mahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
Acutadēvarāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyan
geUttiralu Accutadēvarāyamahāyara da
kṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa bhaṁḍārada tiṁmapaAyyanavari
ge pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu Avara mayiduna koṁḍapagaḷu sū
ryyagrāhaṇapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu kuḍutaṇiya vīrabhadra
dēvara nayivēdyakke jīrnōdhārake koṭa kariya Ereya ho
la ma 2 Akṣaradalu yikuḷa holanū Ubhaya mā
rggada mūle vīsa Etige kāsu saṁteya pasige paḷige
yanū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi sadyaḥ
parichēdavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭeU �yo A
rthakke Āru naḍisidarū pu(ṁ)ṇyavahudu . yidakke Āro
baru tapidavaru taṁma taṁdetāya vāraṇāsili koṁda pā
pake hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 9.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
